page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-to-core ratio, each vCPU maps to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention associated with hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data storage needs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance, making this instance suitable for workloads requiring consistent CPU execution without the variability of shared-core environments. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration represents a tradeoff, positioning this instance for standard enterprise applications, web serving, and middle-tier application servers rather than high-performance database storage or machine learning workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 16 vCPUs and 16 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at 2.7 GHz, the instance features a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on external network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance and balanced memory allocation, such as enterprise application hosting, web serving, and general-purpose business applications.

tagline: A dedicated 16-core AMD EPYC general-purpose instance with balanced memory allocation and consistent compute performance for enterprise workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

Suited for enterprise application hosting, web serving, and middle-tier workloads.
